overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy exploring a lush post-apocalyptic jungle environment. The clip opens with a brief cinematic at a waterfall during golden hour, then transitions to third-person gameplay showing continuous exploration through dense vegetation, past ancient ruins and mechanical creatures, toward a distant Tallneck machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic waterfall overlook at golden hour

events.description: screen fades to black transitioning from cinematic to gameplay

agents.ego_description: Aloy stands still at the waterfall overlook during the cinematic intro, facing the scenery

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down cliff face on the left side
second waterfall visible on the right side of the frame
rocky cliff formations surrounding the waterfall area
pink and orange illuminated clouds during sunset

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a cinematic shot of a waterfall scene during golden hour. Aloy stands at the overlook as the camera captures the scenic view of twin waterfalls against rocky cliffs and a colorful sunset sky before fading to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path transitioning to open ruins clearing

events.description: fade from black into third-person gameplay in dark forest path
exiting narrow canyon into open area with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks steadily through the jungle path, emerging into an open area with ancient ruins and passing small mechanical creatures

notable_agents.action: small mechanical scrappers foraging on the ground near the path

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the jungle
steep rocky cliff face lining the left side of the path
tall red and green bioluminescent plants lining the path
overgrown ancient stone structures with wooden scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the cinematic to gameplay, following Aloy as she walks through a narrow, dense jungle path with tall bioluminescent plants. The environment opens up to reveal ancient ruins on the left, and she passes small mechanical scrappers foraging near the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky jungle path with holographic climbing markers

events.description: blue holographic markers appear on rock surfaces indicating climbable areas
camera tilts upward to look at tall trees and canopy

agents.ego_description: Aloy navigates the rocky trail, passing holographic markers on rocks and briefly looking up at the tree canopy

entered.detail: large boulders and rock outcroppings alongside the path
glowing blue holographic symbols on rocks indicating climbable surfaces
tall tropical palm trees rising above the canopy

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues along a rocky jungle path where ancient ruins give way to natural rock formations. Blue holographic markers appear on the rocks, and the camera tilts up to show the dense tree canopy above before returning to the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open jungle path with distant Tallneck machine

events.description: massive Tallneck machine becomes visible walking in the distance

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues walking along the winding jungle path toward the distant Tallneck machine visible through the trees

notable_agents.action: Tallneck machine walking slowly through the jungle in the distance

entered.detail: tall thin rock spires rising from the jungle floor
thick patches of ferns and undergrowth lining the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider jungle area with tall rock spires visible in the distance. A massive Tallneck machine emerges into view, walking slowly through the trees ahead as Aloy continues her approach along the sun-dappled trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a serene cinematic overlook into an immersive journey through a dense, machine-filled jungle. It begins with a wide view of twin waterfalls against a colorful sunset sky before transitioning into a narrow jungle path lined with tall bioluminescent plants. As the camera follows Aloy, the dense vegetation opens up to reveal ancient ruins and small mechanical scrappers foraging by the trail, which then shifts into a rocky corridor marked by blue holographic signals. The perspective briefly tilts toward the thick overhead canopy before the terrain expands into a wider jungle area characterized by towering rock spires. Finally, the sun-dappled trail leads toward a massive Tallneck machine that emerges from the trees in the distance.
